projectName: Magic ObjDB: The Poly Deck Engine
projectDescription: A Java JPA/ObjectDB demonstration project that models a Magic: The Gathering card database with polymorphic entities, CRUD operations, and advanced JPA lifecycle patterns.
keyFeatures: Polymorphic JPA entity hierarchy with JOINED inheritance (Carta → Criatura, Terra, Encanteri)
ObjectDB embedded object database with JPA 2 interface
Demonstrates JPA entity lifecycle: managed, detached, and merge patterns
Dirty-checking automatic flush vs. explicit detach-and-merge update strategies
Orphan removal cascades: removing a Mazo from a Jugador's list auto-deletes it
JPQL aggregate and path-expression queries (AVG, deep joins across OneToMany/ManyToMany)
File-based seed data loader (pipe-delimited cartes.txt with multi-line description support)
publicApiSurface: GestorCartas.crearJugadorAmbMazo(String nick, int nivell, String nomMazo, List<Carta> cartesMazo): void
Criatura extends Carta (@Entity — forca, resistencia, tipusCriatura, vola)
Terra extends Carta (@Entity — produccio: Color, esBasica: boolean)
Encanteri extends Carta (@Entity — tipus: String, esInstantani: boolean)
Jugador (@Entity — nick, nivell, mazos: List<Mazo> @OneToMany orphanRemoval, colleccio: List<Carta> @ManyToMany)
CostMana (@Embeddable — blanc, blau, negre, vermell, verd, incolor)
Color (enum: BLANC, BLAU, NEGRE, VERMELL, VERD, INCOLOR)
